overall.description: A ship simulator game showing the first-person view from a vessel's bridge navigating through choppy waters under dark overcast skies. The scene features functional navigation monitors with a rotating radar sweep, looking out over the bow deck as it cuts through gray ocean waves.

agents.ego_description: operating the ship from the bridge, monitoring the rotating radar and navigation charts while proceeding through moderate seas

entered.detail: rectangular screen displaying nautical chart with yellow landmasses and blue water
circular black radar screen with rotating yellow sweep arm and range rings
blue screen showing vessel telemetry data and system readouts
red-brown metal deck of the ship's bow with structural plating
metal safety railing with vertical posts along the bow perimeter
dark gray choppy sea surface extending to the overcast horizon

segments.scene_description: The view from inside a ship's bridge looking forward over the bow as the vessel moves steadily through choppy waters. Three navigation monitors are visible overhead, with the center radar display showing a continuous rotating sweep. The ship's railing and deck remain fixed in the foreground while the dark ocean passes by outside the windows.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady first-person perspective from a ship's bridge as the vessel navigates through a restless, dark ocean. It begins with a view looking forward over the bow, where the ship's railing and deck remain fixed in the foreground against the moving water. As the vessel pushes forward, the focus shifts slightly to the overhead navigation monitors, specifically the center radar display with its continuous rotating sweep. The scene then settles into a rhythmic motion, contrasting the stable interior of the bridge with the choppy, gray waves passing by outside the windows.
